SEARCH
Package com.masroofy.model

Class BudgetCycle

java.lang.Object
com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle
public class BudgetCycle extends Object
Represents one active allowance/budget cycle.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BudgetCycle(double allowance, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, double initialDailyLimit)
    Creates a new active budget cycle.

    Deducts an expense amount from the remaining balance.

  • Constructor Details

    • BudgetCycle

      public BudgetCycle(double allowance, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, double initialDailyLimit)
      Creates a new active budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      allowance - total allowance for the cycle
      startDate - first day of the cycle
      endDate - last day of the cycle
      initialDailyLimit - calculated daily limit

  • Method Details

    • applyExpense

      public void applyExpense(double amount)
      Deducts an expense amount from the remaining balance.

    • applyRollover

      public void applyRollover(LocalDate newDate, double recalculatedLimit)
      Updates the cycle after a new day is detected.

    • daysRemaining

      public long daysRemaining(LocalDate currentDate)
      Returns:
      remaining days including the current day

    • isExpired

      public boolean isExpired(LocalDate currentDate)
      Returns:
      true if the cycle end date has passed

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      unique cycle id

    • getAllowance

      public double getAllowance()
      Returns:
      original allowance

    • getStartDate

      public LocalDate getStartDate()
      Returns:
      start date

    • getEndDate

      public LocalDate getEndDate()
      Returns:
      end date

    • getRemainingBalance

      public double getRemainingBalance()
      Returns:
      remaining balance

    • getDailyLimit

      public double getDailyLimit()
      Returns:
      current daily limit

    • getLastRolloverDate

      public LocalDate getLastRolloverDate()
      Returns:
      last date rollover was applied

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Returns:
      whether this cycle is active

    • setActive

      public void setActive(boolean active)
      Sets the active flag.
